description: Initial public and persistence identifier registry.

identifiers.name: userId
identifiers.notes: Internal service identity may use this; do not use as a public bearer capability.

identifiers.name: userUuid
identifiers.notes: Preferred public user identifier where a public user id is required.

identifiers.name: profileUid
identifiers.notes: Represents profile identity in an organization context.

identifiers.name: teamId
identifiers.notes: Must be paired with authorization checks.

identifiers.name: bookingUid
identifiers.notes: Public booking identifier used in URLs and API routes.

identifiers.name: seatUid
identifiers.notes: Public seat identifier for seated booking lookups.

identifiers.name: clientId
identifiers.notes: OAuth client id; not secret by itself.

identifiers.name: code
identifiers.notes: Must be short-lived, client-bound, redirect-bound, and consumed atomically.

identifiers.name: refreshToken
identifiers.notes: Secret-bearing token; replay behavior must be fixture-tested.

identifiers.name: webhookId
identifiers.notes: Every read/write requires ownership or platform authorization.

identifiers.name: slug
identifiers.notes: Normalization and uniqueness scope are contract behavior.
